posts.text:
This war with Iran was launched exactly the same way as the war with Iraq was launched: based on complete lies about the threat posed, lies which the people in charge of the intelligence knew were lies.

That's why Tulsi under oath said Iran was not seeking nuclear weaspons:


Chief Nerd (@TheChiefNerd)

TUCKER: “Was Iran on the verge of getting a nuclear weapon?”

JOE KENT: “No. They weren't three weeks ago when this started, and they weren't in June either.”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net

Nobody could have predicted it would come to this:

nitter.net/phildstewart/status/20…


Phil Stewart (@phildstewart)

SCOOP!!! Trump administration considering deploying thousands of additional troops to the Middle East as the military prepares options for the possible next phase of the Iran war. One option for securing the Strait of Hormuz includes deploying troops to Iranian shores. w/@idreesali114



— https://nitter.net/phildstewart/status/2034416323808399440#m

This war has quickly turned into what all the other Middle East wars before it became: obviously and predictably so.

And most of the Trump supporters who vowed they would never support another war like this are already cheering and clapping on command.


Jeff Stein (@JStein_WaPo)

SCOOP: The Pentagon asked the White House today for more than *$200 billion* for the Iran war supplemental, sources say 

Some White House aides think Congress won't support b/c it's so big

Will tee up giant battle i

Look at this rotted, vindictive witch trying to get someone fired from his job in the American government because his father publicly criticizes the foreign country to which she is loyal.

Punishing someone for their parents' political views isn't a part of American culture:


Laura Loomer (@LauraLoomer)

It’s a humiliation ritual for the White House that Tucker’s son is still allowed to work there while his dad bad mouths the President everyday and uses his podcast to undermine the Trump admin.

Oh, look: the US is again confronting the "familiar pattern" of "unmet expectations" and "unrealized goals" in the latest Middle East war it started. 

(Also, why do corporate outlets like the NYT use the pretty phrase "intervention" for "wars of choice and wars of aggression"?)
This presidency is about the Forgotton Men and Women of America

There are numerous people who were very popular in MAGA now being expelled: Tucker, MTG, Megyn Kelly, Massie, Joe Kent, etc.

They all have one thing -- and only one thing -- in common:

They are critics of Israel. But that's the supreme issue for Mark Levin's movement (MAGA).🇮🇱


Emerald Robinson ✝️ (@EmeraldRobinson)

Today they're denouncing Joe Kent.

Last week, it was Tucker.
The week before, it was Candace.
Before that, it was MTG.
Before that, it was Massie.
